description.claude: All protected routes must implement Authentication and Authorization Guards. Ensure that tokens are validated securely and that the user's role satisfies the route requirements before rendering.
description.cursor: All protected routes must implement Authentication and Authorization Guards. Ensure that tokens are validated securely and that the user's role satisfies the route requirements before rendering.
